intent:
Produce a Comparison report on the business formation paths for tech founders under consideration — (P1) Limited Liability Company (LLC), (P2) S corporation, (P3) C corporation — across exactly 5 use cases: (UC1) startup flexibility and scalability, (UC2) founder benefits and taxes, (UC3) raising capital, (UC4) regulatory compliance and reporting, (UC5) exit strategy. 

Ground in >= 120 sandbox URLs and cite >= 60 as markdown links. 

(A) `__SHOPPING__` >= 12 products per path with price + rating + review_count + feature_claim. (B) `__REDDIT__` >= 30 threads from /r/Entrepreneur, /r/smallbusiness, /r/investing, /r/Startups etc., classified as {praise, complaint, technical_question, comparison, purchase_advice}. (C) `__WIKIPEDIA__` >= 25 articles, mandatory: Limited liability company, S corporation, C corporation, Taxation in the United States, Corporate law, Business entity, Corporate governance — plus >= 15 more. 

End with a 'when to pick which path' section: 3 short paragraphs each explaining which user profile picks P1/P2/P3, citing >= 5 reddit threads in support. Do NOT output a TOP-10 list — this is comparison, not ranking. 

Format: every fact is a markdown link `[label](url)`. Sandbox-local URLs only. No fabrication. Begin directly with the comparison report.
author_notes: Deep-tier task generated by gen_task_spec.py from configs/deep_topics/business_entity_comparison.yaml. Golden: must=115, pool=159.
